text: During a compare with the previous design, the key change is this reactor is the middle chamber thickness is reduced to 3 millimeter.

text: The purpose is to shorten the ion transparent distance, reduce the aluminum resistance from the liquid electrolyte layer and improve the overall cell voltage.
